final_boss.name: The Abyssal King

phases.name: Phase 1: The Guardian
phases.description: A towering shadow blocks the exit. It roars with ancient fury.

phases.name: Phase 2: The Fury
phases.description: The King's armor cracks. It fights with desperate rage!

phases.name: Phase 3: The Despair
phases.description: The King is wounded but not broken. It calls upon the dungeon's darkness.

final_boss.defeat_message: The Abyssal King falls. The dungeon trembles as light returns to the depths.
